message:
✨ Add recurring todo items, re-run support, and dispatch fixes (#120)

* feat: add recurring todo items, re-run support, and dispatch fixes

- Add re-run button for completed todo items (not just failed)
- Add recurring item support with configurable intervals (1m-1h)
- Add run count tracking and optional max-runs limit
- Fix auto-dispatch toggle visibility (brighter OFF state)
- Fix command chaining: send watch-prompt before command to prevent
  race condition where fast commands complete before prompt detection
- Fix tab switching: always set activeTabId regardless of tile mode
- Add server polling every 5s to pick up swarm-submitted items
- Add scheduled dispatch timer for recurring items with intervals
- Persist recurring state (intervalMs, runCount, maxRuns) to server

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: prompt detection, visible-only dispatch, and command execution

- Rewrite prompt-detector to use tmux capture-pane for reliable prompt
  detection (raw PTY output includes tmux status bar which breaks matching)
- Scan last 10 non-empty lines for prompt patterns (TUI apps like Claude
  CLI render prompts on non-last lines)
- Add Claude CLI prompt patterns (❯ and > at start of line)
- Register tmux sessions with prompt detector in create, attach, and
  re-adopt flows
- Send command text and Enter as separate PTY writes with 80ms delay
  (CLI tools in raw mode swallow Enter when sent with pasted text)
- Only dispatch to visible sessions (active tab in single mode, checked
  tabs in tile mode)
- Use tileActive (not raw tileMode) to correctly handle tile mode with
  no checked tabs
- Add on-mount dispatch trigger when pending items exist

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: clock icon and inline schedule picker for existing items

- Replace ↻ icon with ClockIcon from @primer/octicons-react
- Add setRecurring(id, intervalMs) to dispatcher for existing items
- Add clock button on non-recurring items to open inline schedule picker
- Add schedulingItemId state to toggle picker per-item
- Expand presets: 5m, 15m, 30m, 1h, 2h, 6h, 12h
- Wire onSetRecurring through TerminalView → TodoPanel

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: restore terminal scrolling and increase dispatch delay

- Change xterm-viewport from overflow:hidden to overflow-y:scroll
  with scrollbar visually hidden (scrollbar-width:none + ::-webkit-scrollbar)
  so xterm.js can scroll its scrollback buffer via mouse wheel
- Apply scroll fix globally (both tile mode and single mode)
- Increase DISPATCH_ENTER_DELAY_MS from 80ms to 200ms so longer
  commands have time to be processed by tmux before Enter is sent

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: tmux mouse and window-size on re-adopted and attached sessions

- Set mouse on and window-size latest on target session before
  creating grouped clones in attach() and reAdoptOrphanedSessions()
- Add mouse on to the grouped session args in reAdoptOrphanedSessions()
- Remove overflow:hidden from xterm-viewport sx prop (single mode)
  so the global style tag with overflow-y:scroll takes effect

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add token instructions to login page

Show users how to find their auth token with a help box
on the setup page: cat ~/.copilot-remote/auth-token

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add queue button to capture last command from terminal

- Add lastCommand field to TermTab interface, stored separately
  from tab name so it persists even when tabs are manually renamed
- Set lastCommand on WebSocket command events and on mount restore
- Add ListUnorderedIcon queue button to tile header and tab bar
- Button appears when a command has been executed and todo panel
  is open; clicking adds the command as a new pending todo item
- Users can then set recurring schedules on queued commands

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: preserve tab names across server restarts and browser refreshes

- Detect actual running command in tmux via pane_current_command and
  pane_title instead of using raw session ID as lastCommand
- Filter out tmux session identifiers (cr-\d+) from tab name fallbacks
- Cache command-derived tab names in localStorage on command events
- Avoid polluting the name cache with meaningless session IDs

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: queue last command without auto-dispatching

- Add skipDispatch option to addItem so items can be queued as pending
  without immediately running them
- "Last cmd" quick-add in todo panel uses skipDispatch so the command
  is just queued for future scheduling, not launched immediately

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: paused flag prevents auto-dispatch of queued last commands

skipDispatch alone was insufficient — a useEffect watching items would
still trigger tryDispatchNext. Added paused flag to TodoItem that
makes tryDispatchNext skip the item entirely. Unpaused when user sets
a recurring schedule or retries the item.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: allow deleting running todo items

The X button was hidden for running items, which meant stuck items
could never be removed. Now the delete button is always visible.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add Run Now button for scheduled/paused todo items

Adds a play icon button on pending items that have a future nextRunAt
or are paused. Clicking it clears the schedule and paused flag so the
item dispatches immediately.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* style: increase todo item action button and icon sizes

Buttons from 18px to 24px, icons from 10px to 14px for easier tapping.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: increase dispatch enter delay to 500ms for tmux reliability

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* style: clarify todo item running label from "on:" to "running in:"

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* style: update running label to 'running in tab named:'

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: add image drag-and-drop into terminal sessions

Upload dragged images to /tmp/copilot-remote-uploads/ and paste
the file path into the terminal, enabling Claude/Copilot CLI to
process images dropped onto the web interface.

- Server: POST /api/upload endpoint with base64 JSON body
- Frontend: api.uploadFile() helper using existing request()
- TerminalView: drag-drop listeners on tile/single containers
  with visual highlight overlay during drag-over
- Global dragover/drop prevention to stop browser navigation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: enable Cmd+C/V/X/A clipboard operations in terminal view

xterm.js was intercepting Cmd+C/V/X/A and sending them as control
characters to the PTY instead of letting the browser handle native
clipboard copy/paste/cut/select-all operations.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: double-Escape clears input, double-click edits todo items

- ChatView & TodoPanel: pressing Escape twice within 500ms clears
  the text input field
- TodoPanel: double-click a todo item's description to edit it
  inline (Enter to save, Escape to cancel)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* feat: multiline auto-growing textareas for todo input and edit

- Add command input: changed from single-line <input> to auto-growing
  <textarea> with Shift+Enter for newlines, Enter to submit
- Inline edit: changed from <input> to auto-growing <textarea> that
  expands to fit content on open

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: increase todo input textarea to 3 rows default height

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -282,8 +282,27 @@ function ConnectionSetup({ onComplete }: { onComplete: () => void }) {
       <Box sx={{ p: 4, maxWidth: 400, width: '100%' }}>
         <Text as="h2" sx={{ mb: 3, color: 'fg.default' }}>⚡ Copilot Remote Setup</Text>
         <Text sx={{ mb: 3, display: 'block', color: 'fg.muted', fontSize: 1 }}>
-          Enter the auth token shown when you started the server.
+          Enter the auth token to connect to your server.
         </Text>
+        <Box sx={{
+          mb: 3, p: 2, borderRadius: 2,
+          bg: 'canvas.subtle',
+          border: '1px solid',
+          borderColor: 'border.muted',
+          fontSize: 0,
+          color: 'fg.muted',
+        }}>
+          <Text sx={{ display: 'block', fontWeight: 'bold', color: 'fg.default', mb: 1, fontSize: 1 }}>How to find your token:</Text>
+          <Text as="p" sx={{ m: 0, mb: 1 }}>
+            The token is printed when the server starts:
+          </Text>
+          <Box as="code" sx={{ display: 'block', p: 1, bg: 'canvas.default', borderRadius: 1, fontFamily: 'mono', fontSize: '11px', mb: 1 }}>
+            cat ~/.copilot-remote/auth-token
+          </Box>
+          <Text as="p" sx={{ m: 0, fontSize: '11px' }}>
+            Or check the server terminal output for the line starting with "Auth token:".
+          </Text>
+        </Box>
         <Box sx={{ mb: 3 }}>
           <Text as="label" sx={{ display: 'block', mb: 1, fontWeight: 'bold', color: 'fg.default', fontSize: 1 }}>Auth Token</Text>
           <input
